title: DreamStation Humidifier
description: User-friendly chamber design,  Moisture to therapy air, heating mode, Dry box technology, Compatible hose options.
longDescription: The dreamstation heated humidifier by philips respironics is the integrated humidifier designed to connect directly to the dreamstation series machines in order to providefort by adding moisture to therapy air. This humidifier offers a standard fixed heating mode as well as an "adaptive" mode which automatically adjusts heat and moisture levels. For increased warmth, add the optional heated for dreamstation cpap/bipap machines.
